title: cenchrus glaucocladus
intro: Cenchrus glaucocladus, also known as the blue-angled button grass or blue-angle grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to reduce swelling and soothe irritated skin, making it a popular herbal remedy for skin issues. Cenchrus glaucocladus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected area for optimal results.
